BAY OF BISCAY.
FRANCE.
DNC 08.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 031315Z TO 031515Z
   IN:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY:
      46-40.00N 003-48.45W, 46-40.00N 004-43.70W,
      47-15.46N 004-22.61W, 47-25.00N 004-09.91W,
      47-25.00N 003-58.55W.
   B. IN AREA WITHIN 30 MILES OF 47-45.63N 003-26.40W.
   C. IN AREA WITHIN 30 MILES OF 47-18.93N 003-46.53W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 031615Z MAY 23.
